subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! A glorious Book hath been inscribed for thee, verily it proceedeth from the All-Merciful, the Most Compassionate, and veils have interposed between thee and it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قد رقم لک کتاب کریم انه من لدی الرحمن الرحیم و حالت بینک و بینه حجب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
